nasb.text: Then the king arose, tore his clothes and lay on the ground; and all his servants were standing by with clothes torn.

esv.text: Then the king arose and tore his garments and lay on the earth. And all his servants who were standing by tore their garments.

cnv.text: 王就起來，撕裂衣服，躺在地上。侍立在他身旁的所有臣僕，也都撕裂衣服。

ccb.text: 王便站起来撕裂衣服，躺在地上。他的臣仆也都撕裂衣服，站在旁边。
